prompt: Extreme macro product photography of fresh tart cherries (sour cherries / Montmorency cherries). A loose pile of deep red-burgundy tart cherries, some with stems attached, a few slightly split open revealing the juicy interior. Small water droplets on the cherry skin catching light. On a dark matte black stone surface. 100mm macro lens, f/4.0, ISO 200. Diffused side lighting creating depth in the cherry cluster. Deep ruby red, dark burgundy tones. Photorealistic unretouched documentary botanical photography. No text, no labels, no packaging.
negative_prompt: text, labels, packaging, sweet cherries, maraschino cherries, artificial colors, CGI, illustration, cartoon, white background, studio plastic look, low quality, blurry, watermark, logo
